title: crotalaria khasiana var. bhutanica
intro: Crotalaria khasiana var. bhutanica, also known as Bhutan spurge-flax, is a variety of the Crotalaria khasiana plant, a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and as a diuretic. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and acting as an antioxidant, which may help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In traditional medicine, Crotalaria khasiana var. bhutanica is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are used to create herbal remedies.
